data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Users tend to have here lower movement times for closer and larger target areas on the interface.
data.technical_spec: Interface layouts favor large, strategically placed CTA buttons for easier access.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: The time it takes to make a decision increases with the number of choices.
data.technical_spec: Simplified UI design with curated recommendations to support quick decision-making.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetically pleasing designs are perceived as easier to use.
data.technical_spec: Employs a clean, consistent interface that enhances user satisfaction and engagement.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users spend most of their time on other sites, preferring familiar experiences.
data.technical_spec: Aligns design paradigms with common web practices to minimize learning curves.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Objects that are close together are perceived as a group.
data.technical_spec: Grouped elements in video thumbnails and related section to enhance navigability.
